name: Easy One-Dish Ham Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Frozen broccoli cuts, rinsed and drained
1 can Condensed cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz)
1 can Condensed Cheddar cheese soup (10 3/4 oz)
3 cups Cut-up cooked ham, chicken, turkey or beef
2 cups Bisquick Original or Reduced-Fat baking mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In an ungreased rectangular baking dish (13x9x2 inches), combine broccoli, soups, 1 cup milk, ham, and onion powder.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the Bisquick and milk until combined.
4. Pour the biscuit mixture evenly over the soup mixture in the baking dish.
5. Sprinkle with parsley if desired.
6. Bake for 27-30 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Let stand at least 5 minutes before serving. Serves 8-10.
